summary: Comprehensive testing of Engagement Pulse app - Auth, Portfolio Dashboard, Engagement Detail, 4-Blocker, Milestone Date Change, Risk/Issue CRUD. Fixed datetime comparison bugs in dashboard summary and four-blocker APIs. All 13 API tests pass. Frontend tested via Playwright - all major flows working.

minor.issue: FIXED - datetime comparison error between offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes in milestone sorting
FIXED - datetime comparison error in upcoming/overdue milestone filtering

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

action_items: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components to fix accessibility warnings (LOW priority)
critical_code_review_comments: Datetime handling needs consistent timezone awareness across all date operations
Consider creating a utility function for safe datetime comparisons with timezone handling
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed datetime sorting in dashboard summary (line 1809-1818)
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded with 3 engagements (eng_001, eng_002, eng_003), milestones, risks, issues, contacts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working: Admin login->Portfolio Dashboard, Engagement Detail with tabs (Overview, Pulses, Milestones, Risks, Issues, Contacts), 4-Blocker overview, Milestone date change tracking, Risk/Issue CRUD. Consultant login shows 'No Engagement Found' correctly since demo users are assigned to engagements not CompassX users.

login.consultant_login: PASS - redirects to /my-engagement, shows 'No Engagement Found'

engagement_detail.overview_tab: PASS - Shows Summary, RAG Trend, 4-Blocker Overview, Health Score Breakdown
engagement_detail.milestones_tab: PASS - Shows milestones with date change tracking, original date indicator
engagement_detail.risks_tab: PASS - Shows risks with Add Risk button and edit/delete
engagement_detail.issues_tab: PASS - Shows issues with Add Issue button and edit/delete
engagement_detail.date_change_dialog: PASS - Opens and shows date change history

api_tests.four_blocker: PASS - Returns correct 4-block structure with summaries
api_tests.milestone_date_change: PASS - Records date changes with history
api_tests.rag_trend: PASS - Returns weekly RAG trend data
api_tests.dashboard_summary: PASS - Returns RAG counts, issues, risks, milestones
